title: Leadership Style Test
description: Answer 24 quick prompts to explore your leadership style pattern.
instructions: Answer based on recent real behavior, not an ideal version of yourself.
Use the whole scale when a statement clearly fits or does not fit.
Your report highlights the strongest pattern and practical next steps.

COACH.title: Coach
COACH.summary: Your primary result points to a Coach pattern. Treat it as a useful lens, not a fixed label.
strengths: You can create real leverage in the right environment
You tend to build repeatable strategies
weaknesses: Under pressure, you may overuse one strategy
Opposite perspectives can be easy to miss
The result should guide you rather than limit you
careers: Find where this pattern appears most often
relationships: Explain your preference clearly while leaving room for other people's pace and style.
growthPlan: Track the pattern for one week
Practice the new move in a low-risk situation
